select count(*) from appl.elsevier_deid_claims_t;
--58421124
-- 		58,421,124

select patient_age, count(*) from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_t]
group by patient_age
order by 1;
GO

-- select PATIENT_AGE, count(*) from customer.ext_inc_claims_1_t
-- group by PATIENT_AGE
-- order by 1;

-- select top 10 *
-- from [appl].[elsevier_claims_corrected_age_t]
-- where min_patient_age is null;

select patient_gender, count(*) from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_t]
group by patient_gender
order by 1;

select patient_zip_3, count(*) from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_t]
group by patient_zip_3
order by 1;
GO

'G9851', 'G9852', 'G9853', 'G9854', 'G9855', 'G9859', 'M1060', 'S2053', 'S2054', 'S2055', 'S2065', 'Q9001', 'Q9002', 'Q9003', 'Q9004', 'E0301', 'E0302', 'E0303', 'E0304', 'E0911', 'E0912', 'E1035',
'E1036', 'E1038', 'E1039', 'K0006', 'K0007', 'K0800', 'K0801', 'K0802', 'K0806', 'K0807', 'K0808', 'K0813', 'K0814', 'K0815', 'K0816', 'K0820', 'K0821', 'K0822', 'K0823', 'K0824', 'K0825', 'K0826',

'K0856', 'K0857', 'K0858', 'K0859', 'K0860', 'K0861', 'K0862', 'K0863', 'K0864', 'K0868', 'K0869', 'K0870', 'K0871', 'K0877', 'K0878', 'K0879', 'K0880', 'K0884', 'K0885', 'K0886', 'K0890', 'K0891')

select *
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_t] c
where c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'ICD9' 
    and c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] in ('670', '720', '721', '7221', '7229', '7231', '7239', '724', '7251', '7252', '7253', '7254', '726', '7271', '7279', '728', '729', '7301', '731', '7322', '734', '7351', '7359', '736', '7391', '7392', '7393', '7394', '7399', '740', '741', '742', '744', '7499', '7531', '7535', '755', '7550', '7551', '7552', '756', '7561', '7562', '7569', '757', '759', '7591', '7592', '7593', '7594', '7594', '7599', '8916')
GO

select *
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_t] c
where c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'ICD10' 
    and c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] in ('0U7C0DZ', '0U7C0ZZ', '0U7C3DZ', '0U7C3ZZ', '0U7C4DZ', '0U7C4ZZ', '0U7C7DZ', '0U7C7ZZ', '0U7C8DZ', '0U7C8ZZ', '0W8NXZZ', '10D00Z0', '10D00Z1', '10D07Z3', '10D07Z4', '10D07Z5', '10D07Z6', '10D07Z7', '10D07Z8', '10E0XZZ', '10J00ZZ', '10J03ZZ', '10J04ZZ', '10J07ZZ', '10J08ZZ', '10J0XZZ');
GO


select *
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_t] c
where c.[DIAG_CD1] <> '' and c.[ICD_VERSION] = '9'
        and ((try_cast(substring(c.[DIAG_CD1], 1, 3) as int) between 764 and 779) or c.[DIAG_CD1] in ('7616', '799', '7999', 'E9280') 
            or c.[DIAG_CD1] like 'V3%' or c.[DIAG_CD1] like 'E910%' or c.[DIAG_CD3] like 'E913%' or substring(c.[DIAG_CD1], 1, 3) in ('798', 'E80', 'E81', 'E82', 'E83', 'E84', 'E95', 'E96', 'E97', 'E99'))
;
GO

select *
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_t] c
where c.[DIAG_CD1] <> '' and c.[ICD_VERSION] = '9'
        and c.[DIAG_CD1] in ('V8541', 'V8542', 'V8543', 'V8544', 'V8545','V8551', 'V8552', 'V8553', 'V8554')
;
GO

select *
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_t] c
where c.[DIAG_CD1] <> '' and c.[ICD_VERSION] = '10'
        and (c.[DIAG_CD1] like 'P%' or c.[DIAG_CD1] like 'V%' or c.[DIAG_CD1] like 'S06%7A' or c.[DIAG_CD1] like 'S06%8A'  or c.[DIAG_CD1] in ('R99', 'Z651', 'E6601') 
            or substring(c.[DIAG_CD1], 1, 3) in ('X52', 'Y35', 'Y36', 'Y37', 'Y38', 'Z37', 'Z38', 'X92', 'X93', 'X94', 'X95', 'X96', 'X97', 'X98', 'X99', 'Y00', 'Y01', 'Y02', 'Y03', 'Y04', 'Y05', 'Y06', 'Y07', 'Y08', 'Y09', 'W65', 'W66', 'W67', 'W68', 'W69', 'W70', 'W71', 'W72', 'W73', 'W74'))
;
GO

select *
from [appl].[elsevier_deid_claims_t] c
where c.[DIAG_CD1] <> '' and c.[ICD_VERSION] = '10'
        and c.[DIAG_CD1] in ('Z684', 'Z6842', 'Z6843', 'Z6844', 'Z6845', 'Z685', 'Z6851', 'Z6852', 'Z6853', 'Z6854')
;
GO
